summary: Patch 26.7 is the current official Riot patch as of April 1, 2026 and should be treated as the default live context for coaching.
This patch included follow-up Shyvana adjustments plus support-facing balance changes around Karma, Nami and Rell.
Graves and Ornn were nerfed while Cassiopeia and Kalista were buffed, so role-specific advice should keep those recent touches in mind.

championUpdates.summary: Cassiopeia was buffed again in 26.7, so mid-lane prep should respect her stronger current patch power.
Kalista gained power in 26.7, which can raise the pressure of lanes and early skirmishes built around her.
Graves was nerfed in 26.7, so older advice that assumes stronger default jungle tempo or dueling should be softened.
Karma was nerfed, especially relevant for support and flex-lane priority assumptions.
Nami was nerfed in 26.7, so bot-lane coaching should not assume her previous pressure unchanged.
Ornn was nerfed, reducing some of the reliability older top-lane assumptions may still give him.
Rell received buffs that improve engage value, especially in coordinated skirmish or support setups.
Shyvana received immediate follow-up adjustments in 26.7, reinforcing that her current live state differs from older seasons.

systemUpdates.summary: No major neutral-objective system rewrite landed in 26.7, so evergreen macro remains valid and recent champion tuning matters more than map rules this patch.
